description_long: This is a modern, freestanding storage cabinet or shelving unit featuring a combination of open shelves and closed compartments. The exterior is finished in a light wood grain with striking turquoise blue doors and panels on the lower half, creating a visually appealing contrast. The upper section includes multiple open shelves of varying widths and heights, as well as a single blue door that covers one compartment. The lower section consists of several closed compartments with blue doors, all supported by black legs that slightly elevate the unit off the ground. The back and sides are finished in the same light wood tone, with no visible handles or glass panels. This piece is designed for both storage and display, suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or communal spaces.
description: A modern, freestanding cabinet with light wood grain and turquoise blue doors, featuring open shelves and closed compartments on black legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelves on the left and right, a single blue door in the upper center, and multiple blue doors on the lower half.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth, light wood finish, and black legs, with no visible compartments or shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a continuous light wood panel with no visible openings, shelves, or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and construction.
